commands: for path in src/bigclaw/collaboration.py src/bigclaw/github_sync.py src/bigclaw/pilot.py src/bigclaw/repo_triage.py src/bigclaw/validation_policy.py tests/test_cost_control.py tests/test_github_sync.py tests/test_orchestration.py; do test ! -e "$path" && printf 'absent %s\n' "$path"; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1594 changes.

notes: This lane documents the already-empty assigned Python asset slice and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens evidence and regression checks rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Final pushed commit after rebase was `eba9011c`.
